offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We streamline the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
